titleStmt.title: SII 24.434: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 434. (A.R. No. 107 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records (1) the grant of lands in Śembiyaṉ Uttamaśīli, ••• Vṛittarājanallūr, Paṉaiyagaram and two other villages for a feeding charity and (2) another grant of lands in Niṉṟiyūr in Mēl-pilāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam for offerings to the god during his halt at the maṇḍapa built by the donor Tirumalai nāyakkar, son of Viśvanātha-nāyakkar who was the son of Kachchi Nāgamanāyakkar, and also offerings to the deity Tiruvēṅgaḍanāthan consecrated at the maṇḍapa. The first grant which is said to have been made on the occa sion of pañcha-kalyāṇa for prince Veṅkaṭādri-rāyar was made in Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Vṛiśchika, which may correspond to 1536 A.D., November, and the details śu 10, Friday, Śravaṇa, are irregular. The second grant was made in Viḷambi, Kaṉṉi ba. 3, Wednesday, Aśvati which correspond regularly to 1538 A.D. September 11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuhamastu . svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrīvira Accyutadevamahārāyar pṛthivi Irājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 10 4[5 10 8] Itan melc cellāniṉṟa durmmukhisamvatsarañca vṛśvikanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣan=tu daśamiyum śukṛvāramum peṟṟa śravaṇa nakṣatrattu
(ttu)ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍyakulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Accutadevamahārāyar m kaccinākama nāyakkar putran viśvanāthanāyakkar maṉmatha varuṣam svāmi kumāraveṅkaṭātrirāyar pañcakalyāṇattile
mahārāya(r)ṟku puṇya(ya)mākak kuṭutta dharmmaśāsanappaṭṭayam . perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadev(ā)ṟkut tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi tenkarai pāṇṭiyakulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu cempiyaṉ Uttamacilikoyil Uḷppaṭa grāmam 1— Ituvum
vṛttarāja nallūr Uḷkkiṭaiyum ttu koyil Uḷppaṭṭa Uḷkiṭaiyu Uḷkkiṭaiyum paṉaiyakaram Uḷkiṭaiyum Āka kiṟāmam 1 Intak kiṟāmam Oṉṟukkum Uḷkkiṭaikkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nañce puñcey nattam paṭukai tiṭar
Uḷppaṭa tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka perumāḷ śrīraṅ grāmam Oṉṟukkum Uḷkkiṭaikkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku muḷpaṭṭa nidhinikṣepa(m) jalapāṣāṇādi Akṣiṇya kāmya siddhasādhyam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭabhoga deśasāmyaṅkaḷum Uḷppaṭa
Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum Inta kiṟāmamum Uḷkkiṭaiyum viśvanāthanāyakkar puttiraṉ tirumalaināyakkar tanmamāka tiruvaraṅkattārum koyilk kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa cattirattukku nāḷtoṟum muṉṟu taḷikai candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Ituvum viḷampi samvatsarattu
kaṉṉināyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putavāramum peṟṟa Aśvatinakṣatrattu nāḷ svāmi Accyutarāyar mahārāyar dharmmamāka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāḍa deva(r)kku cetta perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar tiru[ varaṅkam] tiruttoppukku Eḻuntaruḷa viśvanāthanāyakkar puttiran tirumalainā
yakkar Upaiyamāka Eḻuntaruḷukiṟat tiruttoppil maṇṭapattil Upaiyattukkum Inta maṇṭapattil pratiṣṭhai Āna tiru veṅkaṭaṉātaṉ nāḷtoṟum Amutu ceytaruḷiṉatukkum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka cettat tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai maḻaṉāṭu melaimuṟi pāccil kūṟṟattil
melppilāṟṟu niṉṟiyūr kiṟāmam 1kku piṟākkuppaṭi dānamāniyam nikki Uṇṭāna ṉān kellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa naṉcey puncey nattam paṭukai tiṭar Uḷppaṭa Iṟṟaṉāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka cettapaṭiyāle niṉṟiyūr grāmam nāṉkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa nidhinikṣepa jalapāṣāṇādi Akṣiṇyāgāmi
yasiddhasāddhyam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭabhogadeśasvāmiyaṅkaḷum Uḷppaṭa Ācandrārkka sthāyi Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum Inta Ūril Utaiyam koṇṭu varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Ellaikkarai vitta mattiyil maṇṭalapperumāḷ toppukku kiḻakku tirumalaināyakkar toppukku
perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Eḻuntaruḷi Inta toppil maṇṭapattil Upaiyam naṭakkak kaṭavatāka Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku koyilkkaṇakku śrīraṅga ṉārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu . Abde nṛpate nnyakā khyamāsaḥ pakṣaḥ kṛṣṇesya viṣṇoḥ tithirapi hariṇilo
canāyādvitīyā . vārasselṛmyotha kābītirutirumalaya viśvanāthendra putro śrīraṅge maṇḍapārttham praditati sumu toninniyūram . cittirait tiruṉāḷāna Accyutarāyar tirunāḷ ntirunāḷaikku tirumalai nāyakkar toppil maṇṭapattil perumāḷ śrī
śrīraṅganāthadevar Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa campāttaḷikai �-kkupon_¥ cemattaḷikai 2 kku pu 4 Ākat taḷikai 100 2- kku poṉ pu 4¥ pori Amutu 5 100-kku pu 7 Atirasam 2 100-kku pon_ vaṭai kku poṉ; cukiyan �-kku pu 6¥ veccamutu kūn 4 10-kku pon_ 10 1pu3¥ pānakam �ṉ 10 2-kku pu3¥
caṉtaṉam paṭi 4 10-kku pu 5 Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu pu 3 Erikarumpukaṭṭu kku pu 5 paṉtattukku neyvilai poṉ 5 maṇṭapattil parivaṭṭavilai pu 10 ttirumuṉkāṇikkai pu 2 nācci(ya) parikalattu pu ¥ koṭikkuṭai Eṭuttaṟkūli pu 3 Ākac ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷai poṉ 10 3 pu1¥ Immaṇṭapattil
tiruveṅkaṭanāyan tiruvārātaṉakkaṭṭaḷaikku varuṣam 1-kku pon_ 2 10 3 pu3¥ tirumālai kaṭṭukiṟa Ūḻiyattukkum tiruvārātaṉam paṇṇukiṟa Uṭaiyā(r)rkum poṉ 3 pu 6 2 Āka poṉ 4 10 Intappoṉṉāṟpatukkum Ivvūr Utayamkoṇṭe varuṣam varuṣamtoṟum candrādityavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭavatākavum Intakkoyil
tecāntari muttirai Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa jiyar tiruvārātaṉamum Ūḻiyamum caṭakopaṉ tirumālai kaṭṭukiṟatukku śrīvaiṣṇavaṉ toppukkum tiruppaṇikkum Ākkum timpayaṉum Āka Inta Ūḻiya vatākavum
Digital edition of SII 24.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
